query:
SELECT 
  'vendors' as table_name, COUNT(*) as record_count FROM vendors
UNION ALL
SELECT 'purchase_requests', COUNT(*) FROM purchase_requests
UNION ALL
SELECT 'purchase_orders', COUNT(*) FROM purchase_orders
UNION ALL
SELECT 'goods_receipt_notes', COUNT(*) FROM goods_receipt_notes
UNION ALL
SELECT 'contracts', COUNT(*) FROM contracts
UNION ALL
SELECT 'payments', COUNT(*) FROM payments
UNION ALL
SELECT 'stock_items', COUNT(*) FROM stock_items
UNION ALL
SELECT 'stock_ledger', COUNT(*) FROM stock_ledger
UNION ALL
SELECT 'documents', COUNT(*) FROM documents
ORDER BY table_name;
